text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Training time comes around, but I<n>don't see Narita
Taishin, so I decide<n>to go looking for her.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hell yeah! That was an easy win! The<n>arcade and
mobile versions of this<n>game are practically the
same.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Aww yeah! I'm on fire! Just gotta<n>keep this
streak going!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Who the heck is this "MightyMe"<n>anyways?
They're relentless!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
We're pretty evenly matched, so why<n>do I keep
losing? Dammit! I'm<n>winning the next round if it
kills me!
choice_data_list: Um, Taishin... You coming to training?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She apologizes, and I tell her to be<n>more careful
from now on.
